summary: A top hero KPI opens the page, a mid-layer row of metrics widens the proof, and a lower chart or table completes the business case.
composition_pattern: top hero, middle metric row, lower proof layer
support_structure: optional assumptions note or small summary strip
when_to_use: The hero message should be read before any side-to-side comparison
The slide needs a cleaner top-down proof sequence
avoid_when: The slide needs a strong side support column
The evidence is too dispersed for a top-down reading flow
